programme.desc: James Morrow takes a deep dive into U.S. politics, giving his unique and hilarious perspective on all things White House and Capitol Hill.

programme.title: Gaza Remains In Frame
programme.desc: The stories and tragedies captured by two Gazan photographers. It illustrates their lives before and after the genocide.

programme.desc: The host presents news from various regions of Turkey along with international news and updates that are related to Turkey.

programme.desc: Covering the untold and under-reported stories from across the continent of Africa while discussing the issues that matter to Africans.

programme.title: Across the Balkans
programme.desc: Exploring the modern day Balkans, a land of breathtaking beauty, and understanding its painful past to discover the issues and fault lines shaping South east Europe today.

programme.title: Strait Talk
programme.desc: Addressing stories and topics related to Turkey along with an in-depth analysis of Turkey's role in the world.

programme.desc: A rise of just two degrees in average temperature will be catastrophic for planet Earth; A dissection of the policies that could prevent environmental apocalypse.
